name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
Current Project: Family and Friends Shared Code Platform

I am combining my Process Based Methodology and scale-proven Technology Rules into a Product enabling seamlessly/secure capability sharing within a group (family, friends, team)

The concept is exciting. Contact me if you want to collaborate.

Synopsis: An Agent will seamlessly conform any code project to work within the framework (using annotations).
The framework securely exposes the "capabilities" within your projects to your Circle of Trust. Think MCP for python tools.
This enables you to control/share resources, project data, and personal data and enables.... a lot...

  • A Control Panel provides namespaced unified views (namespaced) of your projects.
  • A Capability Catalog to provide capabilities and share resources (transport agnostic: Rest, CLI, Async, MCP)
  • A Developer Platform with agents ensuring consistent builds
  • A Simple Workflow for your projects using Light-weight ticketing
  • To Enable Seamless Operations - Monitoring, Documentation, Scheduled tasks, and Data Flows and Sharing

Hands On Backend Technology Leader at hedge funds, investment banks, insurance companies, and startups

Author, Speaker, Free Software Developer
